response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, deep hands-on coding skills across multiple languages (including Python, JavaScript, DLang, C++), and a proven track record in building scalable systems and open-source tools, but lacks explicit evidence of leading experimentation platforms, telemetry infrastructure, or AI-driven growth systems at enterprise scale — key requirements for this Principal role.
strengths: Extensive hands-on coding across languages including JavaScript, Python, C++, and DLang with production experience.
Proven ability to build and ship scalable systems (e.g., real-time data platforms, GISCollective, microservices handling millions of requests).
Strong open-source contributions and technical leadership through workshops, mentoring, and tooling development.
concerns: No clear evidence of designing or owning experimentation frameworks, feature flagging, or growth measurement systems at scale.
Limited visibility into AI tooling usage for accelerating engineering velocity or data-driven decision-making systems.
Experience is fragmented across domains; lacks focused, sustained leadership in growth engineering or cross-team platform initiatives.
